title: creating signature: Card error
body:
I am trying to run a skopeo copy command that also does some signing - and at the end, I see this:
```
Writing manifest to image destination
Creating signature: Signing image using simple signing
FATA[0010] creating signature: Card error     
```
For those of us not versed in the backend of how skopeo interacts with gpg, how can I debug what's going on? I see another closed issue (https://github.com/containers/skopeo/issues/1887) where the answer says to debug gpg myself...?

comments.body:
nvm, we figured it out. Apparently I'd just needed to do:
```
echo test | gpg --clearsign
```

to debug gpg and figure out what was going on...
